emails.body: Re: AGREEMENT WITH RESPECT TO GAS TRANSPORTATION ENA has successfully acquired the PG&E capacity through EPNG's capacity release process. I will forward copies of the awards to legal. Please call if you have any questions. Regards, Stephanie x31688 Gerald Nemec@ECT 04/23/2001 02:06 PM
